40.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

40.gl: morally wrong; concretely, an (actively) bad person
40.kj: [phrase] condemned, guilty, ungodly, wicked (man), that did wrong.

40.gl: to flee for protection; figuratively, to confide in
to slip out, i.e. escape; causatively, to deliver
40.kj: calve, carry away safe, deliver, (cause to) escape.

40.gl: to surround, i.e. protect or aid
